calendar.matters:
Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Engler for Augustine Villa (Trustee).

Mr. Engler stated that there were no oppositions and presented a letter from Ms. Boessenecker confirming that her client would not be filing any papers in response to the petition and that she would not be appearing at today's hearing. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.

Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Continued To Nov-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-02-2008 Continued To Oct-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for Natalie St. Peter. Elisa Engler for Augustine Ayala Villa as Benificiary and specially appearing for George Engler for Augustine Ayala Villa as Trustee.

Ms. Boessenecker stated that the drafting Attorney had provided copies of unsigned estate documents to Mr. Engler and requested a continuance stating that she was going to take the drafting Attorney's deposition. The matter was continued to October 29, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Continued To Sep-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for Natalie St. Peter. George Engler for Augustine Villa (Trustee).

The Parties stipulated to having the matter continued. The Court continued the matter to September 2, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.

Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Continued To Aug-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for Natalie St. Peter. George Engler for Augustine Villa.

Ms. Boessenecker requested a continuance stating that she needed to review the trust and the will. The matter was continued to August 18, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

Petition To Instruct Trustee
